## Section 2: Code Examples

```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");

    let numbers: Vec<i32> = (1..=10).collect();
    let sum: i32 = numbers.iter().sum();

    println!("Sum of 1-10: {}", sum);
}
```

```python
def fibonacci(n):
    """Calculate the nth Fibonacci number."""
    if n <= 1:
        return n
    return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)

for i in range(10):
    print(f"F({i}) = {fibonacci(i)}")
```
